MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOREL BANK & TRUST CO.,,CO-TRUSTEE OF ONETO TRUSTS SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-16-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 03 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-22-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE JOAN SMITH JOHN P. ZANGHI FOR PLTF. WILLIAM MCKENZIE, TERRY BROWN, DEFTS PRESENT & IN PRO PER 4:25 AM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PRESENT. CASE SETTLED, TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFTS FOR RESTIT. OF THE PREM. LOCATED AT 220 NORIEGA #4, SF. CA 94122, $3,642.56 RENTS/DAMAGES, $1,200 ATTYS FEES. JUDGMENT STAYED IF DEFTS VACATE PREM. BY 10/1/93 UPON DEL. OF KEYS TO MICHAEL HALL'S OFFICE, & DEF PAY PLTF. $1,000 IN CASH OR CASHIER'S CHECK BY 5PM 9/22/93. IF AMT PAID, PLTF. WILL DISMISS CASE AS TO DEFT TERRY BROWN. DEFT TO PAY $2,642.56 IN INSTALL. OF $500/MONTH DUE 11/15/93 DELIVERED TO PLTF'S OFFICE, OR MAILED. OTHER TERMS STATED ON THE RECORD. IF DEFT DEFAULTS, PLTF. ON EX-PARTE APPLICA- TION W/ NOTICE HAVE JUDGMENT ENTERED ONLY AGAINST DEFT WILLIAM MCKENZIE. STIP. WILL BE REDUCED TO WRITING FOR DEFTS TO SIGN. PLTF. WILL PREPARE STIP JUDGMENT.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOREL BANK & TRUST CO.,,CO-TRUSTEE OF ONETO TRUSTS AS TO DEFENDANT MCKENZIE, WILLIAMN BROWN, TERRY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCKENZIE, WILLIAMN BROWN, TERRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 220 NORIEGA, APARTMENT 4, SF, CA $3,642.56 RENT, $1,200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,842.56, STAYED UNTIL OCT-01-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
